calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo as assigned by the Department of the Presiding Judge to Dept. 318, Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack, Not Reported
Appearances:
Plaintiff/Respondent Monica Stokes, M.D.
Defendant/Appellant representative Allen Kipper, with witness Roy Castillo.

The parties and witness are sworn.

3:11pm The witness, Roy Castillo, states the FEB-03-2009 Judgment was received on March 10, 2009, thus the untimely filing of the appeal. The Court rules it will hear the Trial de Novo.

The following plaintiff/respondent exhibits are ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE by the Court:
Exhibit nos. A through Z, inclusive and Exhibit nos. AA through CC, inclusive. (see respondent's handwritten exhibit list, pages 1 through 6, for exhibit descriptions).

Defendant/Appellant offers no exhibits.

3:50pm The Court, after hearing the testimony of parties, and considering the evidentiary documentation, takes the matter under submission.

Plaintiff/Respondent exhibits are retained.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Set For Trial On May-06-09 At 09:45 A.M. In Dept 318

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Continued To May-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Christian Fasulo in Pro Per for Respndent/Plaintiff
Mark Belvedere DBA Treehouse Properties in Pro Per for Appellant/Defendant

This cause comes on calendar having been regularly scheduled for a Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are affirmed.

Judge Pro Tem recuses himself from this matter. Matter referred to Department 206 for reassignment.

JPT David Drummond, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
